title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a practical architecture called "the AI Layer" for integrating Claude Code into large codebases. The approach prioritizes harness design, context management, tooling, and configuration, over model capability, implementing components like self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, and subagents.
